response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and notable open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation or growth platforms at scale, AI-driven feature rollout systems, or cross-team leadership in measurement frameworks — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems
Proven track record in building scalable infrastructure and open-source tools
Strong data and systems thinking demonstrated through telemetry-like projects (GISCollective, DLang high-performance apps)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation platforms or feature-flagging systems
Lacks demonstrable experience with AI-driven engineering velocity or growth metric systems
Minimal indication of leading multi-team initiatives or partnering with data science/product on measurement strategy
